compiled_state.title: Update ticket system docs for bash-native dispatch architecture
compiled_state.author: Test
compiled_state.description:
## Task

Update ticket system documentation to reflect the new bash-native dispatch architecture introduced by ticket-lib-api.sh.

### Files to Update

1. `plugins/dso/docs/ticket-cli-reference.md` — add section on sourceable library API:
   - `_ticketlib_dispatch <op> <args...>` subshell wrapper usage
   - `_ticketlib_has_flock` detection variable
   - `DSO_TICKET_LEGACY=1` rollback flag (routes each op back to legacy .sh scripts)
   - Sourceability contract (no exit, no set -euo at library scope, no GIT_* mutation at source time, use return not exit)

2. `plugins/dso/docs/CONFIGURATION-REFERENCE.md` — add `DSO_TICKET_LEGACY` env var entry with description and default (unset = use library; =1 = legacy subprocess mode)

3. `plugins/dso/docs/WORKTREE-GUIDE.md` — if ticket CLI is mentioned, update to note that ops no longer spawn python3 subprocesses in the default path

4. CLAUDE.md — update the 'Ticket system v3 (event-sourced)' blurb to note that the CLI now dispatches through ticket-lib-api.sh by default, with DSO_TICKET_LEGACY=1 rollback

### Testing Mode

GREEN — documentation update, no RED test required (per behavioral testing standard rule 6: instruction files → test structural boundary, not content).

## File Impact

- plugins/dso/docs/ticket-cli-reference.md (UPDATE)
- plugins/dso/docs/CONFIGURATION-REFERENCE.md (UPDATE)
- CLAUDE.md (UPDATE — blurb only)

## Acceptance

- ticket-cli-reference.md has new section for library API
- CONFIGURATION-REFERENCE.md has DSO_TICKET_LEGACY entry
- CLAUDE.md blurb updated
